issue_title: [Bug] No 'undefined' checks when accessing this.target in scrub bar (and possibly in every other component)
issue_body_preview:
### Description
I have a video component in my app that gets created and destroyed pretty often (it's part of a paging where the video component is added or removed via `*ngIf` because of a loading screen component). Sometimes when the component gets destroyed and created again I get an error in th
test_description_zh: 在包含视频播放器的页面中，通过 *ngIf 频繁销毁和重建视频组件（例如快速切换加载界面与视频界面），观察进度条（scrub bar）及其他播放器控件是否能正常工作，控制台是否出现 undefined 相关错误。
expected_result_zh: 视频组件在频繁销毁和重建后，进度条及所有播放器控件应正常渲染和交互，不会因为 target 未定义而抛出运行时错误，播放器功能完整可用。
